articles.title: Fed Minutes Show More Officials Warned of Rate-Hike Scenario

articles.title: US Treasuries Jump as Trump Cites ‘Final Stages’ With Iran
articles.summary: Treasuries surged on investor optimism that the US and Iran were nearing a deal that could ease a rise in global energy prices that has fanned fears around inflation.

articles.title: US Economy Is a 'Levered Bet on AI,' Orszag Says

articles.title: Emerging-Market Assets Rebound Amid Optimism Over Iran War
articles.summary: Emerging-market currencies extended an earlier rebound while stocks erased a decline, as oil prices tumbled on optimism over the outlook for the conflict in the Middle East.

articles.title: EU Expedites Start of US Trade Deal in Bow to Trump Demand
